name: @streetjs/ci-live-sdks
description: Isolated, pinned install of the optional cloud-provider SDKs used ONLY by the vendor-integration live round-trip tests. Deliberately NOT a workspace member and never published. Exists so CI installs these via `npm ci` (lockfile + integrity hashes) instead of an unpinned `npm install`, satisfying OpenSSF Scorecard Pinned-Dependencies (js/pinned-dependencies). See .github/workflows/vendor-integration.yml for how it is consumed.

comments.overrides: Force the transitive `uuid` (pulled in by @google-cloud/storage via gaxios/teeny-request, which pin ^9) up to the patched 11.1.1 that fixes GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq / CVE-2026-41907 (out-of-bounds write in v3/v5/v6 when a caller buffer is supplied). uuid 11.1.1 keeps a CJS `require` export, so gaxios/teeny-request's `require('uuid').v4()` still works; verified `npm audit` clean + all three SDKs load. Chosen over 14.x (ESM-only major, would break the CJS consumers) and over leaving 9.0.1 (Dependabot alert).
